calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Loebner for Clara Huang.

Ms. Loebner addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to costs charged for San Francisco filing fees, the additional appraisals, the fees requested for the Schwab account, billings for internal conferences and charges for directing/instructing staff. In addition, Ms. Loebner stated that they stipulated to removing the mileage fees, that she advised her Client as a Trustee, that no one objected to the petition, that it was a complex matter and that she was going to file a declaration addressing all of the above issues. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
